input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The observed failure is caused by tests using removed classic TypedActor APIs such as org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, and TypedProps; adding a dependency is not the right fix for pekko-actor_2.13 coverage.

The separate pekko-actor-typed_2.13 artifact contains the modern typed actor API, but adding it would broaden the test target beyond pekko-actor_2.13 and is not required for meaningful coverage of this library.

Existing DnsSettings-style coverage may require retaining the current --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED JVM/native-image argument, but general meaningful coverage is reachable without introducing new setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No concrete extra setup is needed: org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1 resolves to only scala-library and Typesafe Config, and normal classic actor/serialization usage is in-process with the pekko-actor artifact and no Docker service or required environment/system property.
